title: Char Kway Teow
description: A famous Penang street food made with flat rice noodles, prawns, egg, and bean sprouts, stir-fried over high heat for a smoky flavor.

title: Curry Mee
description: A rich and spicy noodle soup with coconut milk, tofu puffs, cockles, and prawns, popular in Penang hawker stalls.

title: Nasi Lemak
description: Malaysia’s national dish featuring fragrant coconut rice, sambal, anchovies, peanuts, egg, and often served with fried chicken.
